fixes: Removed title-screen setup-like step cards; title remains the established v66 layout with only requested action changes.
Restored falling cube animation above the demo canvas by separating z-index layers.
Rebuilt background battle demo as an independent responsive canvas with a visible delayed fade-in.

Training courses supply role-specific real trigger loadouts and stationary targets.
